title: Architect compute infrastructure in Azure
summary: Learn how to architect compute infrastructure and solutions to automate your business processes in Azure.

sections.title: Architect compute infrastructure in Azure
sections.summary: Learn how to architect compute infrastructure and solutions to automate your business processes in Azure.

lessons.title: Manage virtual machines with the Azure CLI
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use the cross-platform Azure CLI to create, start, stop, and perform other management tasks related to virtual machines in Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-virtual-machines-with-azure-cli/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage virtual machines with the Azure CLI

lessons.title: Deploy Azure infrastructure by using JSON ARM templates
lessons.content_md:
Write JSON Azure Resource Manager templates by using Visual Studio Code to deploy your infrastructure to Azure consistently and reliably.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-azure-resource-manager-template-vs-code/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy Azure infrastructure by using JSON ARM templates

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Architect compute infrastructure in Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Architect compute infrastructure in Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
